---
title: "SVII Demographic Text for Each State" 
date: now
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss z"
published-title: "Last run"
editor: source
execute: 
  echo: false 
format: 
  docx:
    reference-doc: qmd_helpers/reference_doc.docx
self-contained: true 
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
#| include: false 
library(tidyverse)
library(glue)

demo_table <- readRDS("../app/data/svii_demo_table_prep.rds")
demo_text  <- readRDS("../app/data/svii_demo_text.rds")
```


```{r}
#| label: individual-states
#| results: asis
#| eval: true    
state_list <- state.name # to run all states takes 2 min
lev2_st <- vector(mode = "list", length = length(state_list))
for (i in seq_along(state_list)) {
  lev2_st[[i]] <- knitr::knit_child("qmd_helpers/demo_text_to_word_single_state.qmd", quiet = TRUE, envir = environment())
}

cat(unlist(lev2_st), sep = '\n')
```
